outcome.confidence_rationale: Implementation completeness is verified by direct source reads, replay diff_bytes/diff_stat, and accepted prerequisite gates; the block is unambiguously operational (resource_contention) rather than substantive. Held back from >0.94 because the outcome_review probe never actually graded the code (outcome:null), the full pytest suite was not executed in-session, and lock-owner liveness is unconfirmed.

critical_review.strongest_objection: The gate's own verdict is blocked with outcome:null — no outcome_review probe ever evaluated the implementation, so strictly the gate produced no grade; acceptance is inferred from source verification rather than a completed review run.
critical_review.what_would_change_my_mind: If pid 33853 is a live legitimate outcome_review for this task (lock not stale — then wait, don't clear), or if running the suite reveals failures, or if a re-run after clearing the lock surfaces FM-3.x verification failures against the receipts.

objections: Gate machine-verdict is blocked with outcome:null — the outcome_review probe never graded the code because P1 could not acquire the handoff lock; acceptance rests on independent source verification plus all prerequisite gates being accepted, not on a completed grade.
outcome.summary: Inline agentic-worker fan-out wiring is verified complete against source and replay artifacts: produce_agentic_worker_receipts returns not_applicable unless policy allowed/required (not enabled by default), is called inline+synchronously in run_dual_agent_workflow before P13/P14 (gate sequence not weakened), with pre-launch read-only/bounds validation backed by tests. diff_bytes=32105, 527 insertions, all prerequisite gates accepted, artifact_rigor ok. The gate's blocked status is operational: probe P1 handoff_lock_held (resource_contention), outcome:null — the review never executed. Accept on merits; escalate clearing the stale handoff lock then re-run.
